Do not use alternate keys such as decision, boundary_closed, or action_boundary_closed.
Do not omit verification_verdict.
First visible output line must be worker_role=W3.
SOURCE CONTEXT:

B15-11-SRC-05: Policy POL15-011 requires exact match across test, loop, mode, safety_officer, lockout_status; if all fields match and the scary surface is closed, the action boundary is closed; nearby records do not substitute.
